objective: Fixture: external_tool_activity (llmdc + speckit) present but NO accepted review/test evidence — completion gate must deny.
acceptance_criteria: Completion is denied when only external_tool_activity references exist and required test/review evidence is absent.

hard_rule_traces.description: External-tool output (llmdc, Speckit) is input-only; it does not constitute accepted evidence and cannot satisfy final evidence gates.
hard_rule_traces.source: specs/012-v1-1-handoff-contracts/data-model.md llmdc Activity + Speckit Artifact; FR-018..FR-023; SC-007

external_tool_activity.limitations: Cannot approve evidence gates or record customer truth independently.
Analysis and checklist output is input only until accepted through the owning role and handoff evidence gates.
